subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Creator of earth and heaven! This herald, who hath proclaimed the divine call to the ears of both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه فاطر ارض و سماء این منادی که ندای الهی را بگوش شرق و غرب نمود در
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @universality of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action
